missed_duplicates.anchor: A Nash equilibrium is a strategy profile where no player can gain by changing strategy alone.
missed_duplicates.candidate: In Nash equilibrium, unilateral deviation does not improve any player's payoff.

case_results.anchor: DNA stores hereditary information in sequences of nucleotides that are copied during replication.
case_results.candidate: Hereditary information is encoded in DNA base sequences and preserved when those sequences are replicated.
case_results.enriched_statement: DNA stores hereditary information in sequences of nucleotides that are copied during replication. | Hereditary information is encoded in DNA base sequences and preserved when those sequences are replicated.

case_results.anchor: Natural selection changes populations because heritable traits that improve reproductive success become more common.
case_results.candidate: Traits that increase reproductive success spread through a population under natural selection when those traits are heritable.
case_results.enriched_statement: Natural selection changes populations because heritable traits that improve reproductive success become more common. | Traits that increase reproductive success spread through a population under natural selection when those traits are heritable.

case_results.anchor: Gradient descent trains neural networks by adjusting weights in the direction that reduces loss.
case_results.candidate: Neural network training uses gradient descent to update weights so the loss function decreases.
case_results.enriched_statement: Gradient descent trains neural networks by adjusting weights in the direction that reduces loss. | Neural network training uses gradient descent to update weights so the loss function decreases.

case_results.anchor: A Nash equilibrium is a strategy profile where no player can gain by changing strategy alone.
case_results.candidate: In Nash equilibrium, unilateral deviation does not improve any player's payoff.

case_results.anchor: In an isolated system, entropy tends to increase over time.
case_results.candidate: Entropy ordinarily rises in isolated systems as time passes.
case_results.enriched_statement: In an isolated system, entropy tends to increase over time. | Entropy ordinarily rises in isolated systems as time passes.

case_results.anchor: DNA replication preserves genetic information across cell divisions.
case_results.candidate: DNA transcription copies genetic information into RNA for gene expression.

case_results.anchor: Gradient descent reduces training loss by updating neural network weights.
case_results.candidate: Dropout reduces overfitting by randomly masking units during training.

case_results.anchor: A Nash equilibrium is stable against unilateral deviation.
case_results.candidate: Pareto optimality means no participant can be improved without making someone else worse off.

case_results.anchor: Entropy tends to increase in isolated systems.
case_results.candidate: Free energy determines whether a process is spontaneous at constant temperature and pressure.

case_results.anchor: DNA polymerase synthesizes new DNA strands only in the 5' to 3' direction.
case_results.candidate: DNA replication requires a primer because DNA polymerases cannot start synthesis de novo.

case_results.anchor: Backpropagation computes gradients efficiently through layered neural networks.
case_results.candidate: Gradient descent applies computed gradients to update neural network weights.

case_results.anchor: Mutations introduce new heritable variation into populations.
case_results.candidate: Recombination reshuffles existing alleles into new combinations.
